subject: chore(dx): declare node engines; clean test output; document lint/test
body:
dx trigger pass:

- package.json engines.node: ">=18.18.0" — minimum required by ESLint 9
  (our strictest runtime dep). Makes onboarding friction visible at
  install time instead of failing mysteriously later.

- package.json test script: add --no-warnings alongside
  --experimental-vm-modules. Previously every `npm test` spewed 11 lines
  of "ExperimentalWarning: VM Modules is an experimental feature" before
  real output. The flag suppresses node-level warnings only; Jest output
  and failures are unaffected.

- README.md Commands block: add `npm run lint` and `npm test`. They
  were documented in CLAUDE.md (AI-facing) but absent from the README
  contributors actually read.

Scan clean on: .github/, .vscode/, CONTRIBUTING.md absence (small
project, CLAUDE.md covers onboarding). No .nvmrc added — the engines
field communicates the contract without picking a specific version
manager.

Tags: dx, readme, package-json, tooling, tidy
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: clean-sweep-2026-04
Semver: patch
